title: BEM-538.2 dispatch bridge contract
objective:
Run script:
"""
protocol = Path('governance/protocols/RUNTIME_WORKFLOW_DISPATCH_BRIDGE.md')
protocol.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
reports = Path('governance/reports')
reports.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
proofs = Path('governance/codex/proofs')
proofs.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
state_path = Path('governance/state/contour_status.json')
contour = json.loads(state_path.read_text()) if state_path.exists() else {}

# Inspect codex-runner permissions to decide whether nested workflow dispatch can be implemented via GITHUB_TOKEN.
codex = Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
role = Path('.github/workflows/role-orchestrator.yml')
provider = Path('.github/workflows/provider-adapter.yml')
codex_text = codex.read_text(errors='ignore') if codex.exists() else ''
role_text = role.read_text(errors='ignore') if role.exists() else ''
provider_text = provider.read_text(errors='ignore') if provider.exists() else ''

has_actions_write = 'actions: write' in codex_text
has_contents_write = 'contents: write' in codex_text
role_dispatch_ready = role.exists() and 'workflow_dispatch' in role_text and 'inputs:' in role_text
provider_dispatch_ready = provider.exists() and 'workflow_dispatch' in provider_text and 'inputs:' in provider_text
bridge_mode = 'blocked_needs_dispatch_channel'
if has_actions_write:
    bridge_mode = 'github_actions_nested_dispatch_via_GITHUB_TOKEN'
elif has_contents_write:
    bridge_mode = 'needs_codex_runner_actions_write_permission'

protocol.write_text('# BEM-538.2 | Runtime Workflow Dispatch Bridge Contract\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 13:43 (UTC+3)\n\n## Цель\nРазрешить настоящую workflow-level orchestration проверку: GPT/Deno запускает `codex-runner.yml`, а внутри него безопасный bridge запускает `role-orchestrator.yml` и `provider-adapter.yml` через GitHub workflow_dispatch.\n\n## Разрешённый bridge\nPreferred path:\n`createCodexTask -> codex-runner.yml -> GITHUB_TOKEN with actions:write -> GitHub Actions workflow_dispatch -> role-orchestrator.yml/provider-adapter.yml -> transport/state`\n\n## Требования\n- Не хранить PAT/secrets в файлах.\n- Использовать runtime `GITHUB_TOKEN`.\n- `codex-runner.yml` должен иметь `permissions: actions: write, contents: write`.\n- Target workflows должны иметь `workflow_dispatch` inputs.\n- No issue #31 comments.\n- No schedule triggers except approved `curator-hourly-report.yml`.\n\n## Fallback если bridge недоступен\nЕсли `actions: write` отсутствует или GitHub запрещает nested dispatch, BEM-538.3 должен завершиться точным blocker: `WORKFLOW_DISPATCH_BRIDGE_MISSING`.\n\n## Current inspection\n```json\n' + json.dumps({'codex_runner_exists': codex.exists(), 'codex_contents_write': has_contents_write, 'codex_actions_write': has_actions_write, 'role_dispatch_ready': role_dispatch_ready, 'provider_dispatch_ready': provider_dispatch_ready, 'bridge_mode': bridge_mode}, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + '\n```\n')

contour['updated_at'] = '2026-05-17 | 13:43 (UTC+3)'
contour['bem538_dispatch_bridge_contract'] = {
  'codex_contents_write': has_contents_write,
  'codex_actions_write': has_actions_write,
  'role_dispatch_ready': role_dispatch_ready,
  'provider_dispatch_ready': provider_dispatch_ready,
  'bridge_mode': bridge_mode,
  'blocker': None if has_actions_write and role_dispatch_ready and provider_dispatch_ready else 'WORKFLOW_DISPATCH_BRIDGE_NEEDS_ACTIONS_WRITE'
}
state_path.write_text(json.dumps(contour, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

status = 'PASS' if role_dispatch_ready and provider_dispatch_ready else 'BLOCKER'
report = reports/'bem538_2_dispatch_bridge_contract.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-538.2 | Dispatch Bridge Contract | ' + status + '\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 13:43 (UTC+3)\n\n## Inspection\n| Наименование | Описание | Обоснование |\n|---|---|---|\n| codex-runner contents write | ' + str(has_contents_write) + ' | Needed for repo writes |\n| codex-runner actions write | ' + str(has_actions_write) + ' | Needed for nested workflow_dispatch via GITHUB_TOKEN |\n| role-orchestrator dispatch ready | ' + str(role_dispatch_ready) + ' | Target workflow must accept dispatch |\n| provider-adapter dispatch ready | ' + str(provider_dispatch_ready) + ' | Target workflow must accept dispatch |\n| Bridge mode | ' + bridge_mode + ' | Derived from workflow permissions |\n\n## Blocker\n' + ('null' if has_actions_write and role_dispatch_ready and provider_dispatch_ready else 'WORKFLOW_DISPATCH_BRIDGE_NEEDS_ACTIONS_WRITE before real nested dispatch') + '\n')
proof = proofs/'bem538_2_dispatch_bridge_contract.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-538.2 ' + status + ': bridge_mode=' + bridge_mode + ', role_ready=' + str(role_dispatch_ready) + ', provider_ready=' + str(provider_dispatch_ready) + ', actions_write=' + str(has_actions_write) + '\n')

changed_files.extend([str(protocol), str(report), str(proof), str(state_path)])
ops_applied.append('BEM-538.2 created runtime workflow dispatch bridge contract')
"""
No issue comments.
